title: Week 04 - Sum, Average, and Accumulation
description: Practice summation, conditional summation, averages, and accumulating until a target is reached.

questions.title: Calculate the Sum of Stair Numbers from 1 to n

description.background: A staircase is numbered from step 1 to step n. The teacher wants students to calculate the sum of all stair numbers.
description.task: Calculate the sum of the numbers from 1 to n.
description.output: Return the sum from 1 to n.
description.hint: You can use a variable to store the accumulated result.

questions.reference_code:
function solution(n)
    local sum = 0

    for i = 1, n do
        sum = sum + i
    end

    return sum
end

questions.title: Calculate the Total Fixed Coin Reward Over Several Days

description.background: A game gives the player the same number of reward coins every day. The player logs in for days consecutive days and receives reward coins each day.
description.task: Calculate how many coins the player receives in total.
description.output: Return the total number of coins.
description.hint: You can add each day's reward one by one.

questions.reference_code:
function solution(reward, days)
    local sum = 0

    for i = 1, days do
        sum = sum + reward
    end

    return sum
end

questions.title: Calculate the Total Distance Run Over Several Trainings

description.background: A student runs the same distance, distance meters, each day and trains for days days. The teacher wants to know how many meters the student ran in total.
description.hint: Each day's distance should be added to the total.

questions.reference_code:
function solution(distance, days)
    local total = 0

    for i = 1, days do
        total = total + distance
    end

    return total
end

questions.title: Calculate the Sum of All Even Numbers from 1 to n

description.background: The teacher selects the even numbers from 1 to n and wants to know what these even numbers add up to.
description.task: Calculate the sum of all even numbers from 1 to n.
description.output: Return the sum of the even numbers.
description.hint: Check whether a number meets the condition first, then decide whether to add it to the sum.

questions.reference_code:
function solution(n)
    local sum = 0

    for i = 1, n do
        if i % 2 == 0 then
            sum = sum + i
        end
    end

    return sum
end

questions.title: Count Reward Levels and Calculate Total Reward Coins

description.background: A game has n levels. Whenever a level number is a multiple of step, the player receives reward coins.
description.task: Count the reward levels and calculate the total number of reward coins.
description.input: Three numbers: n, step, and reward.
description.output: Return the reward level count and the total coin count in order.
description.hint: Counting and accumulation can be done in the same loop.

questions.reference_code:
function solution(n, step, reward)
    local count = 0
    local sum = 0

    for i = 1, n do
        if i % step == 0 then
            count = count + 1
            sum = sum + reward
        end
    end

    return count, sum
end

questions.title: Calculate Quiz Total, Average, and Pass Status

description.background: A student takes three quizzes. The teacher needs to calculate the total score and average score, then decide whether the average reaches passLine.
description.task: Use the three scores to calculate the total, average, and pass result.
description.input: Four numbers: score1, score2, score3, and passLine.
description.output: Return the total score, average score, and whether the average reaches the line, in order.
description.hint: Calculate the total first, use it to calculate the average, then decide whether the average reaches the line.

questions.reference_code:
function solution(score1, score2, score3, passLine)
    local total = score1 + score2 + score3
    local average = total / 3
    local passed = false

    if average >= passLine then
        passed = true
    end

    return total, average, passed
end

questions.title: Find the Earliest Day a Growing Daily Savings Plan Reaches the Target

description.background: A student starts saving money on day 1. On the first day the student saves start; each later day, the student saves increase more than the previous day. Now the student wants to know the earliest day the savings total reaches target or more.
description.task: Simulate the daily savings process and return the earliest day that reaches the target.
description.input: Three numbers: start, increase, and target.
description.output: Return the earliest day that reaches the target.
description.hint: Each day, update both the amount saved that day and the total amount saved so far.

questions.reference_code:
function solution(start, increase, target)
    local day = 0
    local current = start
    local total = 0

    while total < target do
        total = total + current
        current = current + increase
        day = day + 1
    end

    return day
end

questions.title: Accumulate Coins Through Levels and Return the Level That Reaches the Upgrade Target

description.background: A player clears levels in sequence. Level i gives i times base coins. Upgrading requires total coins to reach target. The game has n levels.
description.task: Calculate the earliest level at which the player reaches the upgrade requirement; if the target is still not reached after n levels, return 0.
description.input: Three numbers: n, base, and target.
description.output: Return the earliest level number that reaches the target; if it is not reached, return 0.
description.hint: After each level, update the accumulated coins and check whether the target has been reached.

questions.reference_code:
function solution(n, base, target)
    local total = 0

    for i = 1, n do
        total = total + i * base
        if total >= target then
            return i
        end
    end

    return 0
end

questions.title: Count, Sum, and Average Numbers That Meet Conditions

description.background: The teacher selects numbers from 1 to n. A number is selected only if it satisfies both conditions: it is a multiple of k and it is greater than limit.
description.task: Count the selected numbers, calculate their sum, and calculate their average.
description.input: Three numbers: n, k, and limit.
description.output: Return the count, sum, and average in order. If no number is selected, return 0 for the average.
description.hint: Filter by the conditions first, then maintain both count and sum.

questions.reference_code:
function solution(n, k, limit)
    local count = 0
    local sum = 0

    for i = 1, n do
        if i % k == 0 and i > limit then
            count = count + 1
            sum = sum + i
        end
    end

    local average = 0
    if count > 0 then
        average = sum / count
    end

    return count, sum, average
end
